# @lindaui/ui

> React 19 design-system components wrapping **HeroUI v3** (react-aria-components, RAC)
> behind stable, per-component entry points. Where there's an ergonomic wrapper the
> public API is its own (flat props) and does NOT leak HeroUI's RAC composition or types.
> This file is for coding agents: it lists every entry point, its import path, and the
> exact public API so you don't have to infer props from the `.d.ts`.

This is HeroUI **v3** (RAC), NOT NextUI v2. Do not assume v2 "flat" props or names.
For the exact type of any export, read its declaration at
`node_modules/@lindaui/ui/dist/<name>.d.ts`.

## Install

```bash
pnpm add @lindaui/ui @lindaui/tokens
```

Peer dependencies you must provide: `react >=19`, `react-dom >=19`,
`react-hook-form >=7` (only for `field`), and `@lindaui/tokens` (ships the CSS).

## Setup (once, at app root)

```tsx
import "@lindaui/tokens/css"; // HeroUI styles + brand tokens + Tailwind utilities
```

Dark mode: toggle a `.dark` class on any ancestor.

## Import convention

One component per import path. There is NO barrel/root import — always
`@lindaui/ui/<name>`:

```tsx
import { Button } from "@lindaui/ui/button";
import { Select } from "@lindaui/ui/select";
```

## Global conventions (READ — these prevent the common mistakes)

- **Controls emit `onChange`, NOT `onValueChange`.** `checkbox`/`radio`/`switch`
  give `onChange(isSelected: boolean)`; `slider` `onChange(value)`.
- **`select`/`combobox`**: flat `items={[{value,label}]}` + `onChange(value: string)`.
  There is NO `SelectItem`.
- **`dialog`**: controlled `open` / `onClose`. There is NO `ModalContent`.
- **`menu`**: `trigger` is the button **content** (label/icon), not a `<button>` —
  passing a `<button>` nests buttons.
- **`table`**: declarative `columns` / `rows`. Renders a RAC `grid` (cells are
  `gridcell`, header cells `columnheader`/`rowheader`).
- **`button`**: has `variant`, NOT `color`. Variants:
  `primary | secondary | ghost | danger | link` (`link` maps to HeroUI `tertiary`).
- Interactive components are client components (`"use client"`); they work in RSC
  apps as leaf client components.

---

## Forms & inputs (ergonomic flat wrappers)

### @lindaui/ui/button
`<Button variant="primary" onPress={fn}>Save</Button>` — extends HeroUI Button minus
`variant`. `variant: "primary"|"secondary"|"ghost"|"danger"|"link"` (default `primary`).
Use `onPress` (RAC), `isDisabled`, `isPending`.

### @lindaui/ui/input
`<Input label="Email" placeholder="..." value onChange={(v)=>...} />` — composes RAC
`TextField`+`Label`; extends `TextFieldProps` (omit children) + flat `label`/`placeholder`.
`onChange(value: string)`, `isInvalid`, `isRequired`, `name`, `type`.

### @lindaui/ui/textarea
Same flat API as `input` over `TextField` with a multiline textarea. `label`, `placeholder`.

### @lindaui/ui/number-input
`<NumberInput label="Qty" value onChange={(n)=>...} />` — over RAC `NumberField`.
`onChange(value: number)`, `minValue`, `maxValue`, `step`, `formatOptions`.

### @lindaui/ui/search-field
`<SearchField label="Search" value onChange={(v)=>...} />` — emits the string only.
Do the matching yourself with `@lindaui/ui/search` (accent/case-insensitive).

### @lindaui/ui/input-group
Layout wrapper to group an input with addons/buttons.

### @lindaui/ui/otp-input
`<OtpInput maxLength={6} onChange={(v)=>...} />` — re-exports the `input-otp` API
(`OtpInputProps = InputOTPProps`).

### @lindaui/ui/select
`<Select items={[{value,label}]} value onChange={(v)=>...} label placeholder />`
Props: `items: {value,label}[]`, `value?`, `defaultValue?`, `onChange(value)`,
`label?`, `placeholder?`, `isDisabled?`, `isInvalid?`, `name?`. Pass `value` only when
controlled (uncontrolled otherwise — avoids the controlled/uncontrolled warning).

### @lindaui/ui/combobox
Like `select` plus typeahead. Adds `onInputChange(value)`.

### @lindaui/ui/field
RHF adapter. `<Field control={control} name="email" label hint>{({field,invalid})=>
<Input {...field} isInvalid={invalid} />}</Field>` — render-prop gives
`{ field, invalid }`; shows `hint` or the RHF error.

## Controls

### @lindaui/ui/checkbox
`<Checkbox isSelected onChange={(sel)=>...}>Label</Checkbox>` — `onChange(isSelected:boolean)`.
`children` is the label (ReactNode).

### @lindaui/ui/checkbox-group
`<CheckboxGroup value={string[]} onChange={(vals)=>...}>` — emits `onChange(string[])`.

### @lindaui/ui/radio · @lindaui/ui/radio-group
`<RadioGroup value onChange={(v)=>...}><Radio value="a">A</Radio></RadioGroup>`.

### @lindaui/ui/switch
`<Switch isSelected onChange={(sel)=>...}>Label</Switch>` — `onChange(isSelected)`.

### @lindaui/ui/switch-group
Layout-only grouping for switches (no `value`/`onChange` of its own).

### @lindaui/ui/slider
`<Slider value onChange={(v)=>...} minValue maxValue step>Label</Slider>`.

### @lindaui/ui/toggle-button · @lindaui/ui/toggle-button-group
`<ToggleButtonGroup selectionMode="single" onSelectionChange={(set)=>...}>` — emits a
`Set<Key>` (`[...set]` to read). With `selectionMode="single"` children render as
`role="radio"`.

### @lindaui/ui/close-button
Icon close button (`onPress`).

## Overlays

### @lindaui/ui/dialog
`<Dialog open={isOpen} onClose={close} title footer size="md" isDismissable>body</Dialog>`
Controlled. `size: ModalContainer size`. Pair with `@lindaui/ui/use-disclosure`.

### @lindaui/ui/alert-dialog
`<AlertDialog open onClose onConfirm title description confirmLabel cancelLabel
isDestructive />` — confirm/cancel built on `dialog`+`button`.

### @lindaui/ui/menu
`<Menu trigger={<Icon/>} items={[{key,label,onAction,isDanger,isDisabled}]} />` —
`trigger` is button CONTENT, not a `<button>`. Items dispatch by key.

### @lindaui/ui/drawer · @lindaui/ui/popover · @lindaui/ui/tooltip
Compound re-exports of HeroUI v3 (RAC). Import the compound parts and compose; see
the `.d.ts` / HeroUI docs.

## Data display

### @lindaui/ui/table
`<Table columns={[{key,label}]} rows={[{key:ReactNode}]} emptyContent aria-label />` —
RAC grid; row ids + row-header handled internally.

### @lindaui/ui/alert
`<Alert title description>children</Alert>` — composes AlertContent/Title/Description.

### @lindaui/ui/avatar · chip · spinner · skeleton
Thin wraps over HeroUI — pass HeroUI props straight through. `avatar` exposes only the
Root (no `Avatar.Image`/`Avatar.Fallback`).

### @lindaui/ui/badge (bespoke)
`<Badge variant="default">text</Badge>` — bespoke, uses `@lindaui/tokens`. Not HeroUI.

### @lindaui/ui/status-chip (bespoke)
`<StatusChip status="BORRADOR" />` — `status: "BORRADOR"|"CONFIRMADO"|"FIRMADO"`.

### @lindaui/ui/listbox · tag · tag-group · breadcrumbs · link · pagination
Compound re-exports of HeroUI v3. Note renames: `BreadcrumbsItem` (not `BreadcrumbItem`).

## Feedback & progress

### @lindaui/ui/toast
HeroUI v3 queue API: `toast` / `toastQueue` + mount `<ToastProvider/>`. NOT `addToast`.

### @lindaui/ui/progress · progress-circle · meter
Compound re-exports. Renames: `Progress` = `ProgressBar`.

## Disclosure & navigation

### @lindaui/ui/accordion · tabs · disclosure · disclosure-group · card · surface
Compound re-exports of HeroUI v3 — compose the parts; see `.d.ts`.

## Typography & primitives

### @lindaui/ui/text
Re-export of HeroUI `Typography` (+ `Heading`/`Paragraph`/`Code`). `Text` = `Typography`.

### @lindaui/ui/divider · scroll-shadow · kbd
Re-exports. `Divider` = `Separator`.

## Date / time / color (compound re-exports — read the `.d.ts`)

These re-export HeroUI v3 compound components verbatim (composition is too deep to
flatten). They need `@internationalized/date` values for date/time:

`date-input` (=DateField) · `date-picker` · `date-range-picker` · `time-input`
(=TimeField) · `calendar` · `range-calendar` · `color-picker` · `color-area` ·
`color-slider` · `color-field` · `color-swatch` · `color-swatch-picker`.

## Charts primitive

### @lindaui/ui/chart
shadcn-style primitive over **recharts** (not HeroUI). `<ChartContainer config={{key:
{label,color}}}>` injects `--color-<key>`; recharts children use `var(--color-<key>)`,
dark mode comes free. Also exports `ChartTooltip(Content)`, `ChartLegend(Content)`,
`useChart`, type `ChartConfig`. Concrete charts live in `@lindaui/blocks`.

## Utilities & hooks

### @lindaui/ui/search
`normalizeText(s)` (lowercase + strip diacritics) and `matchesSearch(haystack, query)`
— resilient list filtering (e.g. "maria" matches "María"). Use in your `.filter()`.

### @lindaui/ui/cn
`cn(...classes)` — re-export of `cn` from `tailwind-variants` (tailwind merge+dedup).

### @lindaui/ui/use-disclosure
`const { isOpen, open, close, toggle } = useDisclosure(defaultOpen?)` — boolean state
for controlled overlays; callbacks are stable.

### @lindaui/ui/use-media-query
`useMediaQuery(query)` (SSR-safe) + `useIsDesktop()` / `useIsMobile()` anchored to the
`md` breakpoint (768px).
